overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA: Vice City showing the protagonist Tommy Vercetti walking across a sandy beach during a heavy rainstorm at night. The character moves from an open beach area facing the illuminated city skyline toward a palm-tree lined coastal path, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible through the rain.

events.description: character turns left to walk parallel to the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking across wet sand toward the illuminated city skyline in the distance

entered.detail: cluster of tall illuminated skyscrapers with lit windows visible through rain
wet sandy beach with small ridges and puddles from the rain

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a wide open beach during a heavy downpour at night, facing the glowing city skyline across the sand. Rain streaks down as the character walks forward toward the distant lights, with the camera following from behind.

agents.ego_description: walking along the beach parallel to the coastline with the city on the left side

entered.detail: tall modern glass and concrete buildings with illuminated windows lining the coast

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the character walks along the shoreline with the city skyline now positioned to the left. The beach stretches out to the right while the illuminated buildings create a glowing backdrop through the heavy rain.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach path passing close to the row of palm trees

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the edge of the beach, swaying in the wind

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks alongside a dense line of palm trees on the left, with the beach continuing to the right. The trees partially obscure the city buildings behind them as the rain continues to fall heavily.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rain-drenched beach at night that shifts from an open view of the city skyline to a sheltered path lined with palm trees. It begins with the character walking forward through a heavy downpour toward the glowing lights of the distant city. As the character turns left, the perspective shifts so the illuminated skyline becomes a backdrop to the left while the wide expanse of the shoreline opens up to the right. The scene then transitions as the character approaches a dense row of palm trees, which begin to partially obscure the city buildings. Finally, the camera follows the character as they walk alongside the tropical foliage, with the rain continuing to streak across the neon-lit environment.
